$schema: Each asset describes a real Zevo app screen/feature. The concept generator and asset picker prefer these over stock footage when there is a semantic match for the shot. Paths are relative to the brand-assets dir and MUST match the actual files in videos/.

assets.description: Screen recording of the Zevo app's nutrition / diet dashboard. Shows daily calorie tracking, macro breakdown (protein/carbs/fat rings), logged meals and the personalized diet plan, on the dark-navy + emerald-green Zevo UI in Turkish.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — demonstrates the calorie & nutrition tracking dashboard, the core diet feature.

assets.description: Zevo app onboarding: the user enters personal data (age, height, weight) so the app can build a personalized plan. Dark-navy emerald Turkish UI, hand tapping through input screens.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — the initial personalization data-entry step.

assets.description: Zevo app onboarding: the user answers health-related questions (activity level, health conditions) during setup so the program adapts to them. Turkish dark-navy emerald UI.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — health-profile step of the personalization questionnaire.

assets.description: Zevo app onboarding: the user selects injury history / problem areas so the AI avoids risky movements. Turkish dark-navy emerald questionnaire UI, hand tapping options.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — injury-profile step of the personalization questionnaire.

assets.description: Zevo app onboarding: the user picks their sport / training environment and experience level during setup. Turkish dark-navy emerald UI with selectable cards.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — sport & experience step of the personalization questionnaire.

assets.description: Zevo app home screen showing the weekly workout calendar / schedule — planned training days, rest days and the personalized program overview on dark-navy emerald Turkish UI.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — the home calendar / weekly plan overview.

assets.description: Zevo app full-body workout flow focused on the squat exercise — set/rep tracking, exercise animation and 'Seti Tamamla' style controls on dark-navy emerald Turkish UI.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — navigating and tracking a full-body squat workout.

assets.description: Zevo app shoulder-day workout plan — exercise list (overhead press, lateral raise, etc.), navigation between movements and timers, on dark-navy emerald Turkish UI.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — navigating a shoulder-day workout plan.

assets.description: Live screen recording of Zevo's AI form-check for squats: an emerald skeletal overlay tracks the body, a real-time FORM score and rep counter ('TEKRAR') update as the user moves. Dark-navy emerald Turkish UI.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — AI form-check tracking a live squat with score and reps.

assets.description: Live screen recording of Zevo's AI form-check for a seated shoulder press: emerald skeletal overlay, a '100' form score, rep counter ('TEKRAR') and load value. Dark-navy emerald Turkish UI.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — AI form-check tracking a live shoulder press with score and reps.

assets.description: A quick, slightly blurry handheld selfie-style clip of a person — candid, real, unpolished. Useful as a neutral / 'before' lifestyle beat (not an app screen).
assets.narrative: neutral-state — candid lifestyle beat, no UI.

assets.description: Full ZEVO logo reveal animation with final call-to-action. Neon-emerald 'ZEVO' logo with a tech/circuit pattern animates on dark navy. Tagline 'Cebindeki Antrenör' plus App Store / Google Play buttons. Vertical 9:16. Outro only.
